words.definition: n. 划艇
n. 向上钻营的人, 推进器
n. 不协调, 不一致, 不合适\n[化] 异元性; 不相容性
words.example: The incongruity of her situation struck Gina with unpleasant force.
words.exampleTranslation: 吉娜猛然意识到自己处境尴尬，心里很不舒服。

words.definition: n. 魔鬼, 邪神, 能手, 成癖者
words.example: A tearful husband repeated calls for help in catching the fiend who battered his wife.
words.exampleTranslation: 泪流满面的丈夫再三呼吁协助抓住殴打他妻子的那个恶棍。

words.definition: a. 未被唱颂的, 未赞颂的
words.example: one of the unsung heroes of French politics
words.exampleTranslation: 法国政坛的一位无名英雄

words.definition: n. 灌木, 灌木林
words.example: a tangled mass of overgrown shrubbery
words.exampleTranslation: 枝蔓交错、疯狂生长的灌木丛

words.definition: [计] 无监督的
adv. 不够地, 不能胜任地
a. 不感动人的, 不动人的
a. 该罚的, 可罚的\n[法] 该罚的, 可受惩处的
n. 闪光, 炫目, 浮华
n. 自明之理, 众所周知, 老生常谈\n[法] 老生常谈, 陈词滥调
words.example: And trust in rising home value as a truism as reliable as a sunrise was a major contributor to the catastrophic collapse of the economy.
words.exampleTranslation: 并且对于家庭价值作为真实性而信任，认为它和日出一样的可靠，这份信任是经济灾难性崩溃的主要贡献者。
